summary: Kinnship Build #57 (Privacy Indicator + Nav Polish) — full backend + web E2E pass. BACKEND (17 tests run; 16 pass, 1 pre-existing import-path failure in Build #56 blank-push module test — NOT Build #57 code): (1) New Build #57 suite /app/backend/tests/test_build57_privacy_indicator.py — 4/4 pass: PUT /me/preferences{location_sharing_enabled:false} propagates to db.members with the Build #57 loosened match ($or user_id/owner_id, no family_group_id constraint); own row goes flag=false, lat/lng=None, location_name='Location Sharing Off'; log line '[privacy] location_sharing=False propagated to 1 member doc(s) for user=<uid>' verified in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log; the family_group_id=null edge case is also cleared (seeded via mongosh, verified via mongosh). (2) Build #57 startup backfill migration verified in log: 'Build #57 backfill: location_sharing_enabled set on 5 pre-existing member doc(s).' Second run (post-restart in test loop) will emit 'no members needed migration' — code path in server.py:3925-3936 confirmed idempotent. Consistency sweep code path present at server.py:3942+ (fires only when a user has sharing OFF at boot; not triggered this cycle because baseline is all-ON). (3) Build #56 regression suite /app/backend/tests/test_build56_privacy_propagation.py — 12/13 pass; the one failure (TestBlankPushDefense.test_would_render_blank_rules) is a stale 'from backend.expo_push import _would_render_blank' import path that only works under a specific cwd/pythonpath (pre-existing since Build #56; NOT a Build #57 regression). All privacy-propagation tests pass: baseline flag default True, toggle off propagates, toggle on flips flag but does not fabricate coords, is_self upload gate on OFF, upload works on ON, refresh-trace 404 hygiene, PATCH /auth/me + GET/PUT /me/preferences partial-update regressions. FRONTEND (web E2E, viewport 390x844, Alice JWT primed): (T1) Dashboard normal state — with sharing ON + coord seeded, member-card renders '📍 TEST_Seed_NYC' + '🟢 Tracking healthy' pill; member-privacy-off-<id> testID absent. PASS. (T2) Dashboard sharing-off state — after toggling OFF, card innerText='🔒 Location Sharing Off' inside testID member-privacy-off-a9ef...; NO '📍' anywhere in the card; NO tracking-pill node in the DOM subtree of that card. PASS. Visual screenshot at /tmp/dash_off_final.png confirms the neutral 🔒 row replaces both the pin line and the status pill. (T3) Me tab icon — after Metro rebundle, tab-bar innerText: Family='👨‍👩‍👧', Me='👤', Alerts='🔔'; NO '•' bullet fallback. PASS. (T4) Me toggle round-trip — clicking [data-testid=me-location-sharing] fires PUT /api/me/preferences (200) IMMEDIATELY followed (within the same tick) by GET /api/members — confirmed via page.on(request) capture; PUT resp idx=1, GET req idx=2 in the ordered event stream (i.e. refetchMembers() invocation from me.tsx:344 is working, no polling-cycle delay). PASS. (T5) Member detail sharing-off banner — /member/<id> reached via dashboard card tap renders testID member-sharing-disabled with text '🔒\nLocation Sharing Off\nThis family member has chosen not to share their location.'; member-get-directions button is absent. PASS. NOTES: Metro is running with CI=true (no HMR), so any code change requires `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` for the web bundle to pick it up — did that once mid-run when the FIRST pass showed stale bundle (📍 Location Sharing Off placeholder + '•' Me tab icon); second pass with fresh bundle showed the new UI. Warnings observed but harmless: (a) expo-notifications 'push token changes not fully supported on web' — pre-existing, not Build #57; (b) 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — pre-existing react-native-web Pressable warning across the codebase; (c) 'action REPLACE with payload {name: (tabs)}' — Expo Router redirect warning when navigating direct to /(tabs) group URLs, benign, existing since prior builds.

minor.issue: Import path 'from backend.expo_push import _would_render_blank' fails under normal pytest cwds (both /app and /app/backend). Pre-existing test-only bug (not Build #57 regression); use 'from expo_push import _would_render_blank' when running from /app/backend, OR add /app to PYTHONPATH.

action_items: OPTIONAL/POST-BETA: Fix the stale 'from backend.expo_push' import in /app/backend/tests/test_build56_privacy_propagation.py:295 — swap for 'from expo_push import _would_render_blank' (backend runs with cwd=/app/backend, sys.path already includes it). Not blocking Build #57 release.

OPTIONAL/POST-BETA: Metro is running in CI mode ('reloads are disabled') — any future frontend fix requires `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` for the web bundle to reflect the change. Consider removing CI=true from the supervisor env if HMR during QA is preferred.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1682-1699 — Build #57 correctly drops family_group_id from the propagation match query; the $or on user_id/owner_id is safe (both are globally unique user identifiers) and covers the legacy self-member docs where family_group_id was never populated. Verified via edge-case test (mongosh-seeded fg=null doc → cleared).

server.py:3908-3937 (_backfill_location_sharing_flag) — idempotent one-time backfill. Uses {location_sharing_enabled: {$exists: false}} match so subsequent runs no-op cleanly. Logged 'set on 5 pre-existing member doc(s)' on this cluster's boot, will log 'no members needed migration' next restart.
server.py:3942+ (_sync_user_sharing_pref_to_members) — only runs when a user has sharing OFF at boot; correct scope guard.

frontend/src/Icon.tsx:22-29 — 'person', 'person-circle', 'person-circle-outline', 'person-outline' all map to 👤 — this defends against any future _layout.tsx name change also falling back to '•'. Good.
frontend/app/(tabs)/me.tsx:344 — `void refetchMembers()` fire-and-forget after every toggle succeeds; no await + no crash on network failure; matches spec.

frontend/app/(tabs)/dashboard.tsx:807-832 — the sharing-off branch AND the pill-suppression branch both key off `(member as any).location_sharing_enabled === false` (strict equality). If the field is absent (legacy row not yet migrated), the check evaluates false → normal render — a safe fallback that avoids false-positive privacy rows for un-migrated data. The Build #57 backfill migration guarantees all existing rows have the field, so this is belt-and-suspenders.

success_rate.backend: 94% (16/17); 100% for Build #57-specific tests (4/4) + 12/13 on Build #56 regression suite (1 pre-existing import bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5): dashboard normal, dashboard sharing-off with member-privacy-off-<id> testID + no 📍 + no pill, Me tab icon = 👤, Me toggle → immediate GET /api/members, member detail sharing-off banner

seed_data_creation: Created disposable self-linked member 'TEST_Alice_B57_FE' (id=a9ef2736-a859-400b-824b-040cab1c2d1b) via POST /api/members + mongosh user_id link; used for all dashboard/member-detail flows; hard-deleted via DELETE /api/members/{id} at end of run (backend returned {ok:true, cascaded:{...:0}}). Alice's preferences restored to location_sharing_enabled=true at teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reference test suites: /app/backend/tests/test_build57_privacy_indicator.py (new for Build #57) + /app/backend/tests/test_build56_privacy_propagation.py (still current for regression). Run with `pytest backend/tests/test_build57_privacy_indicator.py backend/tests/test_build56_privacy_propagation.py -v` from /app. IMPORTANT: Metro runs in CI mode (no HMR), so ALWAYS `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` and wait ~15s after any frontend code change before E2E tests, or the browser will serve the stale bundle (this cost me one full iteration — first pass returned '📍 Location Sharing Off' + '•' Me tab because the pre-restart bundle was still live). Web auth setup unchanged from iter13: set localStorage['kc_token']=<Alice JWT>, disclaimer_accepted=1, onboarding_done_v1=1, and @kinnship/pin_setup_dismissed_v1={<uid>:Date.now()}. To reach /member/<id>, prefer dashboard→card-tap over direct URL (JS may not hydrate the tabs stack from a direct /member URL). For the toggle immediacy test (Build #57 spec #3), use page.on('request') to capture the ordered API event stream — the acceptance signal is GET /api/members REQ index > PUT /api/me/preferences RESP index within a 2-3 second window post-tap.
rca_of_issue: No open bugs. All Build #57 acceptance criteria met on the fresh bundle: (P0 dashboard) 🔒 Location Sharing Off + testID member-privacy-off-<id> replaces both the '📍 Location...' line AND the TrackingStatusPill on the caregiver's dashboard card whenever a member has location_sharing_enabled=false — matches specified UI verbatim. (P0 propagation) PUT /me/preferences with sharing=false clears every member doc keyed off user_id OR owner_id (Build #57 dropped the family_group_id filter to catch legacy self-member docs). (UI polish) Me tab icon renders 👤 (matches Family's 👨‍👩‍👧 + Alerts's 🔔 in visual weight), no more '•' bullet fallback. (UX immediacy) me.tsx:344 `void refetchMembers()` after the toggle triggers a real GET /api/members within ~50-200ms of the PUT response, so the caregiver's dashboard flips state in the same UI tick rather than waiting up to a full polling cycle.
